name: BOOKED.
description: AI readability infrastructure for fashion creatives. BOOKED. closes the legibility gap between career quality and digital discoverability — so casting directors, agents, and AI systems find the right people.
slogan: Your work is good. The infrastructure around it isn't.

entryPoint.description: Free AI readability scan — entry point for all BOOKED. services

itemListElement.name: Free AI Readability Scan
itemListElement.description: Instant automated scan of a fashion creative's digital presence. Scores discoverability, AI visibility, and infrastructure gaps. No cost. Entry point to the BOOKED. diagnostic system.

itemListElement.name: Tier 0 — AI Readability Audit
itemListElement.description: Full manual audit of a fashion creative's digital presence against BOOKED.'s Industry Readability Framework (IRF). Scores across five dimensions: AI discoverability, platform consistency, content legibility, infrastructure quality, and narrative clarity. Delivered as a branded PDF report with scored findings and priority action items.

itemListElement.name: Tier 1 — Signal
itemListElement.description: Audit plus implementation roadmap. Includes the full IRF audit report, a prioritised 30-day action plan, and one live strategy session. Designed for fashion creatives who need diagnosis and a clear path forward without full build support.

itemListElement.name: Tier 2 — Structure
itemListElement.description: Audit plus portfolio website build. BOOKED. designs and deploys a production-ready portfolio site calibrated to casting director behaviour and AI readability standards. Includes semantic HTML, schema markup, GEO infrastructure, and custom domain deployment.

itemListElement.name: Tier 3 — Full Build
itemListElement.description: Complete AI readability infrastructure build. Includes audit, portfolio site, GEO deployment stack (llms.txt, schema, sitemap, robots.txt), ongoing maintenance retainer, and 90-day check-in. The full BOOKED. system — for fashion creatives who want to be findable by humans and AI systems simultaneously.

priceSpecification.description: Pricing from R15,000 — final quote based on scope

itemListElement.name: Agency Roster Intelligence
itemListElement.description: B2B service for boutique modelling and creative agencies. BOOKED. audits an agency's full roster against the IRF and produces a Roster Intelligence Report — identifying which talent has critical discoverability gaps and what infrastructure they need. Priced per roster size.
